title: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 - Overview

detail.title: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 for Even Semester May-June exams is out. Check how to download college‑wise exam centres, important dates, official PDFs and FAQs here.

content.text: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 for May-June Even Semester exams has been released in PDF format on the official AKTU portal, and students can check their allotted exam centre by downloading the list and searching with their college code or name. This list helps B.Tech, B.Pharm, MBA, MCA and other students know exactly where their university exams will be held and plan their travel and exam‑day arrangements in advance.

sections.heading: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 - Overview

content.text: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow publishes a dedicated exam centre list before every major semester examination to inform students about their final exam centres. The AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 has been issued for the 2025-26 Even Semester exams scheduled in May-June 2026, and it is available online in PDF format on the official website. The list is prepared college‑wise and centre‑wise, so every affiliated college is mapped to a particular exam centre for the given phase.
Direct Link to Download AKTU Exam Centres 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download AKTU Exam Centres 2026 Here

sections.heading: Key Highlights of AKTU Exam Centre List 2026

rows: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow
B.Tech, B.Pharm, B.Arch, BHMCT, B.Voc, MBA, MCA, M.Tech, M.Pharm and others, as mentioned in the notice
May-June 2026 (as per even semester date sheet)
Exam Centre List (Tentative/Final - as per PDF heading)

sections.heading: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 PDF - Direct Access

content.text: Many students search only for the direct download links instead of browsing through multiple menus. In your article, place the links near the top so that users can quickly access them.
You can structure this section like:

items: AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 (Even Semester - Tentative/Final) - Download Official PDF
AKTU Even Semester May 2026 Exam Dates / Date Sheet - Download PDF
AKTU Examination Centre / Circular Section - Visit official page on aktu.ac.in

content.text: Use clear call‑to‑action anchor text like “Download Exam Centre PDF”, “Download Date Sheet”, or “Click here to view official notice” so both users and search engines understand what each link offers.

sections.heading: How to Download AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 from aktu.ac.in

content.text: This section targets students with informational and navigational intent, guiding them through the official website.
Step‑by‑Step Process to Download AKTU Exam Centre List 2026

items: Open any browser on your mobile or computer and visit the official website aktu.ac.in.
On the homepage, go to the “Examination”, “Circular”, or “Notices” section from the main menu or quick links.
Look for the latest notice with a title similar to “Tentative Exam Centre List 2026 - Even Semester” or “Final Exam Centre List - Session 2025-26”.
Click on the notice link; the exam centre list PDF will open in a new tab.
Click the download icon or use the save option to store the PDF on your device.
After downloading, open the PDF and use the search (Ctrl + F / find) option to locate your college by college code or college name.

content.text: Details Mentioned in AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 PDF
Once students open the PDF, they will typically find the following information in tabular form:

items: Exam centre code
Exam centre name
Full postal address of the centre (with city/district)
List of mapped colleges with their college codes
Course category allotted to each centre (B.Tech, B.Pharm, MBA, MCA etc.)
Exam phase details such as Phase I / Phase II, if applicable
Any special remarks/instructions for particular centres

content.text: Adding a short note advising students to double‑check the latest version (tentative vs final) will increase trust and reduce confusion.
Direct Link to Download AKTU Even Semester May 2026 Exam Dates PDF Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download AKTU Even Semester May 2026 Exam Dates PDF Here

sections.heading: AKTU Even Semester May 2026 Exam Dates

content.text: Along with the centre list, AKTU releases the Even Semester exam schedule, so your article should briefly connect both documents.
AKTU May 2026 Even Semester Exam Schedule - Key Dates
You can present the major dates in a clean table for better readability:
Update the dates strictly according to the official May 2026 exam date sheet PDF before publishing.

sections.heading: Courses and Students Covered Under AKTU Exam Centre List 2026

content.text: This section answers “Who does this list apply to?” and clarifies eligibility/applicability rather than exam eligibility in the admission sense.
Courses Covered Under AKTU Exam Centre List 2026
Based on usual AKTU patterns and the exam schedule, the exam centre list is typically applicable to:

items: Undergraduate (UG) programmes B.Tech B.Pharm B.Arch BHMCT B.Voc Other AKTU‑affiliated UG courses mentioned in the circular
B.Tech
B.Pharm
B.Arch
BHMCT
B.Voc
Other AKTU‑affiliated UG courses mentioned in the circular
Postgraduate (PG) programmes MBA MCA M.Tech M.Pharm Other PG programmes included in the exam schedule
MBA
MCA
M.Tech
M.Pharm
Other PG programmes included in the exam schedule

content.text: Clarify that the exact list of courses is always given in the heading or body of the official notice, and students should verify that their course and semester are included.

sections.heading: Session and Semester Applicability

content.text: The AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 is for the Even Semester exams of the 2025-26 academic session. It generally covers:

items: 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th (and higher, where applicable) semesters
Regular students appearing in Even Semester exams
Carry over / back paper and leftover candidates, as mentioned in the official notice

content.text: You can also suggest that students check if the list is for Phase I, Phase II, or a combined phase, as AKTU sometimes conducts exams in multiple phases.

sections.heading: How to Check Your AKTU Exam Centre 2026 Using College Code

content.text: Most students want a quick and practical way to know “Where will my exam centre be?”. This section should be straightforward and action‑oriented.
Method 1 - Check Exam Centre Using College Code in the PDF

items: Open the AKTU Exam Centre List 2026 PDF on your device.
Use the search option (Ctrl + F on PC / search icon in mobile viewer).
Type your college code (or a unique part of your college name).
The PDF will highlight rows where your college appears under a particular exam centre.
In the same row, check the Exam Centre Code, Exam Centre Name, and address - this is your allotted centre for the given exam phase.
Note down the centre name, full address and centre code for future reference.

content.text: Method 2 - Confirm Exam Centre Through College or Class Representative

items: After AKTU releases the exam centre list, most colleges forward the PDF in official WhatsApp/Telegram groups, college websites or notice boards.
If you are confused between multiple versions (tentative vs revised vs final), contact your college exam cell, department office or class representative (CR) to confirm the final exam centre.
Always rely on official communication rather than random social media screenshots.

sections.heading: Important Instructions Related to AKTU Exam Centre 2026

content.text: This section helps students avoid common mistakes and sets correct expectations.

items: The exam centre allotted in the latest AKTU exam centre list is generally treated as final for that exam phase unless the university issues a revised list.
AKTU usually does not allow individual students to request a change of exam centre; any corrections are handled through official university/college communication.
Students must carefully check the exam centre printed on their admit card and ensure it matches the latest official list.
In case of a mismatch, students should immediately contact their college exam cell and follow the instructions based on the most recent official notice.

On the exam day, candidates should reach the centre at least 30-45 minutes before the reporting time with: Printed AKTU admit card Valid photo ID (such as Aadhaar, college ID or other accepted ID) Allowed stationery and materials as per exam guidelines
Printed AKTU admit card
Valid photo ID (such as Aadhaar, college ID or other accepted ID)
Allowed stationery and materials as per exam guidelines

sections.heading: AKTU Official Links and Helpline

content.text: Always encourage students to verify every detail from official sources before relying on any third‑party information.

items: Official Website: aktu.ac.in
Examination / Circular Section: Accessible from the main menu where exam notices, centre lists and timetables are uploaded.
College Exam Cell / University Contact: Students can use the contact information provided on the AKTU website or in the circular to resolve exam centre‑related issues through proper channels.
